rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal's cost of living, tourism, or Iberian climate risks; all baselines continue decaying.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal stalemate keeps mild indirect energy price uncertainty for Portugal, but no new development changes the picture from last cycle.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant journeys
top_events.summary: The Pope's visit to the Canary Islands draws attention to Atlantic migration routes that also affect Portugal's southern waters, though no direct policy change results.

top_events.title: World Cup 2026 kicks off in Mexico
top_events.summary: The World Cup opening has minor positive tourism and economic sentiment effects for Portugal as a football-passionate nation, but no material economic impact this cycle.
